mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_review_task (review_id, source_type, title, description, status, submitter_id, client_batch_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{sourceType}, #{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{submitterId}, #{clientBatchId}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO content_review_file (file_id, review_id, object_key, file_name, file_size, mime_type, preview_url, sort_index, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{fileId}, #{reviewId}, #{objectKey}, #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType}, #{previewUrl}, #{sortIndex}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT t.review_id, t.source_type, t.title, t.description, t.status, t.submitter_id, su.real_name AS submitter_name, t.reviewer_id, ru.real_name AS reviewer_name, t.reason, t.created_at, t.reviewed_at FROM content_review_task t LEFT JOIN user su ON su.user_id = t.submitter_id LEFT JOIN user ru ON ru.user_id = t.reviewer_id WHERE t.review_id = #{id}

SELECT file_id, review_id, object_key, file_name, file_size, mime_type, preview_url, final_url, sort_index FROM content_review_file WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} ORDER BY sort_index ASC, created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE content_review_task SET status = 'approved', reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, reviewed_at = NOW(), reason = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{id} AND status = 'pending'
UPDATE content_review_task SET status = 'rejected', reason = #{reason}, reviewer_id = #{reviewerId}, reviewed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE review_id = #{id} AND status = 'pending'
